PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar May-28-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Hilary Pierce, via ZOOM, counsel for Mark Carges, Petitioner.

The court begins by asking if there are any objections to this petition. None are presented.

The Petition for Spousal Property is taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
